violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Back prep table needs to be restained.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Condenser in freezer has ice build up.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Was not emitting sanitizer.
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
